name: rpn_dev
creator: garycmartin
description: More powerful version of the RPN code in development, treat as unstable expect to use most of your available program memory. Additions over the simple RPN version are; str and rcl for storing and recalling a memory value; auto for standard format numbers; fix for setting fixed decimal notation (push a number to the stack first for the number of places, i.e. 2 fix for rounding to two decimal places); eng for engineering notation (where the exponent is in powers of a thousand); si for displaying International System units (G, M, k, m, u, n, etc).
